description: Finger Node Index is a node that returns the finger index a BodyNode has, or -1 if it isn't a body node that is part of a finger.

fields.Node: The node to check for a finger node index for
fields.* ([[Type:Int|int]]): The finger segment index of the given Node (BodyNode) or -1 if Node (BodyNode) is not a finger segment. It will return a value from 0 to 23, counting in the order the finger nodes appear on the BodyNode page for the fingers.
